---
title: "The Rt. Rev. Robert Gray"
---

## The Rt. Rev. Robert Gray

**Dates:** (3 Oct 1809-1 Sept 1872)

### Description

Bishop of Cape Town

### Biography

He became  Bishop of Cape Town in 1847.  He married (1836) Sophia Wharton Myddleton. [Morshead, <i>Robert Gray</i>; ODNB]

### Letters

- Letter from Jan 31 [1894]   
- Letter from April 22nd [1872]
- Letter from January 19, 1869
- Letter from July 1st [1868]
- Letter from [July 1853]
- Letter from July 9th [1853]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
